DESCRIPTION: Place cards that can #yEcho into empty echo slots.
Cards with this keyword can be #yEternalize'd and trigger their echo effect when #yCharon triggers.
Trigger all echo effects from all cards in the echo bar and in the elegy zone.
Exhaust the rightmost card in the echo bar and trigger its echo effect a number of times equal to #yEmber stacks.
At end of turn, if this card is in your hand, reduce X by 1 and #yRetain it; when X reaches 0, #yExhaust it and lose 3 HP; when #yCharon'd, it enters the elegy zone.
At end of turn, if this card is in your hand, #yEternalize it; if there are not enough echo slots, put the rightmost echo bar card into the discard pile.
